name: ChatGPT
description: OpenAI's flagship AI assistant. Versatile for coding, writing, analysis, and general tasks.
free_tier_details: GPT-3.5 free, GPT-4o with ChatGPT Plus ($20/mo)
best_for: General tasks, coding help, writing, analysis

name: Claude
description: Anthropic's AI assistant with a 200k token context window. Excellent for long document analysis, coding, and nuanced reasoning.
free_tier_details: Free tier with Claude Sonnet, Claude Pro at $20/mo
best_for: Long documents, code review, detailed analysis

name: Google Gemini
description: Google's multimodal AI assistant with a 1M token context window. Deep integration with Google Workspace.
free_tier_details: Free tier available, Gemini Advanced with Google One

name: Perplexity AI
description: AI-powered search engine that provides cited, real-time answers. Great for research and fact-checking.
free_tier_details: Free with daily limits, Pro at $20/mo
best_for: Research with real-time information and citations

name: Mistral AI
description: European AI company offering high-performance open and closed models. Le Chat is their consumer assistant.
free_tier_details: Le Chat free, API has pay-as-you-go

name: Cohere
description: Enterprise AI platform with Command, Embed, and Rerank models. Strong RAG and search capabilities.

name: xAI Grok
description: xAI's Grok model with real-time X (Twitter) data access. Witty and unrestricted conversational AI.

name: DeepSeek
description: Chinese AI lab with powerful open-source models. DeepSeek-R1 rivals top models on reasoning benchmarks at low cost.
free_tier_details: Free web chat, API pay-as-you-go (very cheap)

name: GitHub Copilot
description: AI pair programmer that suggests code completions in real-time inside your editor. Now free for all GitHub users.
free_tier_details: Free for all GitHub users (2000 completions/month), Copilot Pro at $10/mo

name: Cursor
description: AI-first code editor built on VS Code. Chat with your codebase, generate code from descriptions, and debug with AI assistance.

name: Cline
description: Open source AI coding agent for VS Code. Can read/write files, run commands, and complete complex coding tasks autonomously.
free_tier_details: Free and open source (bring your own API key)

name: Windsurf
description: Agentic AI IDE by Codeium. Features Cascade, an AI that can autonomously plan and execute multi-step coding tasks.
best_for: Agentic AI coding with project-wide context

name: Aider
description: AI pair programming in your terminal. Works with git repos and supports GPT-4, Claude, and local models.
free_tier_details: Free open source (bring your own API key)
best_for: Terminal-based AI pair programming with git integration

name: Tabnine
description: Privacy-focused AI code assistant with local model options. Supports all major IDEs.

name: Continue.dev
description: Open-source AI code assistant for VS Code and JetBrains. Connect to any LLM including local models.
best_for: Customizable AI coding with any LLM backend

name: Ollama
description: Run large language models locally with a single command. Supports Llama, Mistral, Gemma, and 50+ other open models.

name: LM Studio
description: Desktop app to discover, download, and run local LLMs. User-friendly GUI for model management.
best_for: Non-technical users wanting local LLM UI

name: Jan.ai
description: Open-source ChatGPT alternative that runs completely offline. Desktop app with model library.

name: LangChain
description: Framework for developing applications powered by large language models. Connect LLMs to external data and actions.
free_tier_details: Open source framework, free to use

name: LlamaIndex
description: Data framework for LLMs. Connect custom data sources to LLMs for RAG and agentic applications.

name: DSPy
description: Framework for algorithmically optimizing LLM prompts and weights. Replace prompt engineering with programming.

name: Hugging Face
description: The GitHub for ML models. Host, discover, and run 500,000+ models. Free inference API included.

name: Replicate
description: Run open-source ML models with a simple API. Thousands of models including image generation, video, and LLMs.

name: Groq
description: Blazing-fast LLM inference API. Run Llama, Mixtral, and Gemma at 500+ tokens/second. Best-in-class speed.

name: Together AI
description: Fast and affordable inference for 50+ open-source models. Great prices for Llama, Mistral, and more.

name: Fireworks AI
description: Fast inference API for open-source LLMs. Compound AI systems with function calling support.

name: OpenRouter
description: Unified API for 100+ LLMs. One integration to access OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and open-source models.

name: Vercel

name: Netlify

name: Render

name: Fly.io

description: Developer-friendly cloud platform. VPS droplets, managed databases, Kubernetes, and App Platform.

name: Upstash

name: Turso
